subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken amidst all created things: Verily, there is none other God but Me, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, and He Who hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان العظمه بین البریه انه لا اله الا انا العلیم الحکیم و الذی اتی من
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator
